bookmarks.author: John.Higgins
bookmarks.title: Soundcore’s Space 2 are an evolution of its budget headphones
bookmarks.description: We finally have an update to the Soundcore Space One that launched two and a half years ago. At MWC 2026, Soundcore has announced the Space 2, which will be available in the US on April 21st in three colors - linen white, jet black, and seafoam green - for $1…
bookmarks.content: The Space One have been on best-of lists for years, but maybe its time for the Space 2 to usurp them. The Space One have been on best-of lists for years, but ma… [+4435 chars]
